states.name: requested
states.description: Accepted Restore Request has a durable Restore Run identity but no target mutation has begun.
entry_requirements: Request, bundle, compatibility decision and target intent are fixed.

states.name: validating
states.description: Compatibility freshness, target generations, grants and component availability are revalidated immediately before mutation.

states.name: preparing
states.description: Target reservation, Provider/materialization generation, storage and grants are being prepared.
entry_requirements: Target execution context and new generations are fixed.

states.name: restoring
states.description: Checkpoint components are being applied to the target runtime/storage.

states.name: starting
states.description: Restored runtime components are being started/bound.
entry_requirements: Component restore results and target generation exist.

states.name: verifying
states.description: Runtime/application postconditions and unresolved effects are being read back.
entry_requirements: Target materialization exists and Recovery Verification is executing.

states.name: partially_restored
states.description: Only an explicitly accepted subset restored; limitations and failed/skipped components remain.
entry_requirements: Partial scope was authorized and component results/limitations are retained.

states.name: restored_runtime
states.description: Target runtime/materialization exists after restore; application recovery remains a separate Verification outcome.
entry_requirements: Restore component results and runtime existence/read-back Receipts are retained.

states.name: recovery_failed
states.description: Restore/recovery did not meet required scope/postconditions; partial outputs and uncertain effects remain retained.
entry_requirements: Failure, cleanup/containment and unresolved effects are recorded.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Restore was cancelled and target temporary/partial state was reconciled.
entry_requirements: Cancellation and cleanup/partial evidence are retained.

required_preconditions: Restore Request is accepted and Activity/Operation identity exists.
Compatibility/grants/snapshots are current immediately before mutation.
Target placement/reservation and new provider/materialization generations are fixed.
Target is prepared and component restore Attempts are correlated.
Required component results meet the authorized runtime-start scope.
Target runtime/materialization exists and new-generation read-back is possible.
Partial restore was explicitly allowed and limitations/failed components/unresolved effects are retained.
Required runtime restore scope and existence/read-back pass; application recovery outcome remains separately referenced.
Failure/cleanup/containment, partial outputs and unresolved effects are retained.
Cancellation, cleanup/containment and partial state are reconciled.
